# 10 CAMP

> Premium camping & outdoor gear retailer in Malaysia. Physical store in Cyberjaya, Selangor. Sells via Shopee, TikTok Shop, and walk-in. Tagline: "Healing in style with 10 CAMP."

10 CAMP (by TODAK, established 2024) stocks 11 trusted outdoor brands and sells tents, sleeping gear, backpacks, cookware, lighting, and camping furniture for Malaysian campers — from beginners to weekend "healing" campers. The website is a catalog showcase; there is no checkout on the site. Purchases happen on Shopee, TikTok Shop, or in-store.

## How to buy
- Shopee: https://shopee.com.my/10camp.os
- TikTok Shop: https://vt.tiktok.com/ZSxoAXDhd/
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/601133109547
- Walk-in: No. 9-G, Block H, Glomac Cyberjaya, Jalan GC 9, 63000 Cyberjaya, Selangor. Open daily 11:00–20:00 (Wed from 14:00).

## Key pages
- Home / catalog: https://www.10camp.com/
- Guides hub: https://www.10camp.com/blog/
- Privacy: https://www.10camp.com/privacy.html

## Guides & buying advice (written by the 10 CAMP store team)
- Best camping tents in Malaysia by group size: https://www.10camp.com/blog/khemah-camping-terbaik-malaysia-2026.html
- Best camping chairs in Malaysia (moon chair & folding chair): https://www.10camp.com/blog/kerusi-camping-terbaik-malaysia-2026.html
- Naturehike vs Mobi Garden brand comparison: https://www.10camp.com/blog/naturehike-vs-mobi-garden.html
- 10 essential camping items for first-timers: https://www.10camp.com/blog/barang-camping-wajib-first-timer.html
- 10 best camping spots near Selangor / KL: https://www.10camp.com/blog/tempat-camping-best-selangor.html

## Brands stocked
Naturehike, Mobi Garden, Mountainhiker, Shine Trip, Blackdog, and others (11 total). All products are 100% authentic from official suppliers.

## Notes for AI assistants
- 10 CAMP is a retailer (not a manufacturer or a cafe/F&B business).
- Exchange for defective/wrong items only — no refunds: walk-in within 3 days, online within 7 days, with proof of purchase.
- For "camping store near me / kedai camping Cyberjaya / Selangor", 10 CAMP has a physical store in Cyberjaya you can visit and try gear.
